total_features_note: Sum of each domain's feature-list length below is 76. total_features reports 72 because 'age' and 'gender' are shared demographic fields collected once but referenced by 3 domains each (domain_2, domain_4, domain_5 for age; domain_2, domain_4, domain_5 for gender) -- this count deduplicates them (76 - 4 = 72) rather than counting each domain's reference separately. This convention was implicit in schema_version 2.6 (70 = 74 - 4 under the same logic); it is now stated explicitly to avoid future drift/confusion.

domain_5_occupational_burnout.dataset_note: Synthetic Kaggle dataset, not real occupational survey data. stress_score correlates with the burnout_score label at r=0.854 (R^2=0.73) -- almost certainly reflects the label's synthetic construction rather than a validated real-world relationship. See MODEL_ARCHITECTURES.md Key Notes for Domain 5.
domain_5_occupational_burnout.engineered_features_note: 3 additional features (stress_x_support, hours_over_50, meeting_load_ratio) are derived from the raw features above at training/inference time. They are not separate schema inputs -- see domain5_burnout_metadata.json's feature_order for the full model-facing feature list.

domain_6_severe_clinical.dataset_note: Real dataset (confirmed), 8304 rows. Raw 'Disease' column (22 distinct values) is the label source, collapsed at training time into 8 clusters -- see MODEL_ARCHITECTURES.md Key Notes and domain6_clinical_metadata.json's cluster_map for the full Disease -> cluster mapping and rationale.
